title: Big Candy Canes Tags (Pack of 12 with 12 Pieces of 20cm Ribbon, 12cm x 6cm Cardstock Labels)
features: Pack of 12 Gift Tags with 12 Pieces of 20cm ribbon.
Printed single sided to allow you to write on the back.
Each tag measures an impressive 12cm by 6cm (4.75in by 2.4in).
Printed onto thick luxury 350gsm satin finish cardstock.
Can be used as gift tags to label presents, party or wedding favor tags or for scrapbooking & craft projects.
